knownPatterns.pattern: Model ID ambiguous — it matches multiple models
knownPatterns.fix: Use fully-qualified model IDs (e.g. deepseek/deepseek-chat instead of deepseek-chat)

knownPatterns.pattern: ECONNRESET on streaming response
knownPatterns.fix: Add retry logic with exponential backoff for transient network errors

knownPatterns.pattern: File lock deadlock — timeout exceeded
knownPatterns.fix: Add timeout to acquireFileLock to prevent permanent deadlocks

knownPatterns.pattern: Memory leak in accessLog — orphaned entries
knownPatterns.fix: Clean up orphaned accessLog entries during consolidation cycles

knownPatterns.pattern: Event loop blocked during package install
knownPatterns.fix: Use async exec instead of execSync for package installation

knownPatterns.pattern: Path traversal attempt — resolved outside root
knownPatterns.fix: Validate resolved path starts with workspace root using path.resolve

knownPatterns.pattern: Partial write corruption on crash
knownPatterns.fix: Write to temp file then atomic rename to prevent corruption

knownPatterns.pattern: SSE connection dropped — client disconnect
knownPatterns.fix: Implement heartbeat pings and auto-reconnect with backoff

knownPatterns.pattern: Subscription leak — unbounded growth
knownPatterns.fix: Cap MAX_SUBSCRIPTIONS per agent and clean up on disconnect

knownPatterns.pattern: Heal loop infinite retry — same error recurring
knownPatterns.fix: Add max retry count and circuit breaker for repeated heal failures

knownPatterns.pattern: File lock deadlock — timeout exceeded
knownPatterns.fix: Add timeout to acquireFileLock to prevent permanent deadlocks
